クラス ProfileLoader

java.lang.Object
mechanics.optimization.ProfileLoader
public class ProfileLoader extends Object
Parses named action profiles from a plain-text profile source.

The source may contain one or more named profiles in the following format: 

PROFILE: BurstCombo
SKILL
BURST
ATTACK_UNTIL_END

PROFILE: SkillOnly
SKILL
ATTACK

File resolution is intentionally kept outside this parser so runtime code can stay independent from external profile-file naming conventions.

    static class 
    ProfileLoader.ActionProfile
    A named sequence of action commands for one character.

  • メソッドの詳細

    • loadProfiles

      public static List<ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> loadProfiles(Reader reader)
      Parses all ProfileLoader.ActionProfiles from the provided character profile text.

      Blocks are delimited by PROFILE: <name> headers. Lines that are blank or contain only whitespace are ignored. If the source contains no valid profiles, a single fallback profile is returned.

      パラメータ:
      reader - source containing profile definitions
      戻り値:
      a non-empty list of ProfileLoader.ActionProfiles; never null

    • defaultSkillFallback

      public static List<ProfileLoader.ActionProfile> defaultSkillFallback(String profileName)
